all.en: Last weekend, I invited eight friends to my apartment for a potluck dinner party.
all.zh: 上週末，我邀請了八位朋友到我的公寓參加一場百樂餐聚會。

all.en: I asked each guest to bring one dish so that nobody would have to cook too much.
all.zh: 我請每位客人帶一道菜，這樣就不會有人煮得太辛苦。

all.en: To make sure we did not end up with five salads, I created a shared online list.
all.zh: 為了避免最後出現五份沙拉，我建立了一份線上共享清單。

all.en: My contribution was a roasted chicken with lemon, garlic, and fresh herbs from my balcony.
all.zh: 我貢獻的是用檸檬、大蒜與陽台上香草烤製的烤雞。

all.en: Sarah brought a colorful Greek salad, while Tom showed up with homemade dumplings.
all.zh: 莎拉帶來色彩繽紛的希臘沙拉，湯姆則帶了自製水餃。

all.en: My neighbor surprised everyone with a giant pot of spicy Thai curry and jasmine rice.
all.zh: 我的鄰居帶來一大鍋辣味泰式咖哩與茉莉香米，讓大家大為驚喜。

all.en: We arranged all the dishes on a long table so that everyone could serve themselves.
all.zh: 我們把所有菜餚擺在一張長桌上，讓大家可以自助取用。

all.en: The variety of flavors was amazing, and nobody left the table feeling hungry.
all.zh: 風味多元得令人驚嘆，沒有人離開餐桌時還覺得餓。

all.en: After dinner, we played board games and shared stories until almost midnight.
all.zh: 晚餐後，我們玩桌遊、分享故事，幾乎玩到午夜。

all.en: Cleaning up was easy because each guest took home their own empty containers.
all.zh: 清理工作很輕鬆，因為每位客人都把自己的空容器帶回家。

all.en: Everyone agreed that potlucks are a relaxing and affordable way to enjoy time together.
all.zh: 大家一致認為，百樂餐是一種輕鬆又經濟的相聚方式。

all.en: The next morning, I found a kitchen full of empty wine glasses and forgotten leftovers.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我發現廚房裡滿是空酒杯與被遺忘的剩菜。

all.en: Sarah sent a thank-you message and asked if we could make potlucks a monthly tradition.
all.zh: 莎拉傳來感謝訊息，問我們能否把百樂餐定為每月的傳統。

all.en: Everyone in the group enthusiastically agreed and started suggesting themes for future dinners.
all.zh: 群組裡的每個人都熱情地同意，並開始為未來的聚餐提議主題。

all.en: For our second potluck, we chose a Mediterranean theme with dishes from Greece and Spain.
all.zh: 第二次百樂餐，我們選了地中海主題，準備希臘與西班牙的料理。

all.en: Tom impressed everyone with a homemade paella loaded with seafood and fragrant saffron rice.
all.zh: 湯姆做了一道自製西班牙海鮮飯，配上香氣四溢的番紅花飯，令大家驚艷。

all.en: My neighbor brought a creamy hummus along with warm pita bread fresh from her oven.
all.zh: 鄰居帶來了滑順的鷹嘴豆泥，還有剛從烤箱出爐的溫熱皮塔餅。

all.en: We even hired a small Spanish guitar player to set the mood for the entire evening.
all.zh: 我們甚至請了一位西班牙吉他手，為整個夜晚營造氣氛。

all.en: By the third potluck, we had a private group chat just for sharing recipes and photos.
all.zh: 到了第三次百樂餐，我們有了一個專門分享食譜與照片的私人聊天群。

all.en: Hosting these dinners helped me become much closer to my friends and neighbors.
all.zh: 舉辦這些晚餐讓我與朋友和鄰居變得更加親近。

all.en: I learned that good food, shared laughter, and open doors create a true sense of home.
all.zh: 我體會到，美食、共同的歡笑與敞開的家門，才能營造真正的家的感覺。

all.en: For our fourth potluck, we chose a Japanese theme and decorated the apartment with paper lanterns.
all.zh: 第四次百樂餐，我們選了日式主題，並用紙燈籠裝飾公寓。

all.en: Sarah rolled fresh sushi at the kitchen counter while everyone gathered around to watch.
all.zh: 莎拉在廚房檯面捲新鮮壽司，大家圍在旁邊觀看。

all.en: Tom brought a giant pot of miso soup with tofu, seaweed, and tiny mushrooms.
all.zh: 湯姆帶來一大鍋味噌湯，裡面有豆腐、海帶與小小的香菇。

all.en: My neighbor demonstrated how to make perfect tamagoyaki using a square Japanese frying pan.
all.zh: 鄰居示範如何用方形的日式煎鍋做出完美的玉子燒。

all.en: We played a friendly chopstick challenge using small candies as practice for our new guests.
all.zh: 我們用小糖果玩了一場有趣的筷子挑戰賽，讓新客人練手。

all.en: By the fifth potluck, our group had grown to fifteen people from six different countries.
all.zh: 到了第五次百樂餐，我們的人數已成長至十五人，來自六個不同的國家。

all.en: Each guest taught us one phrase from their native language while serving their special dish.
all.zh: 每位客人在上菜時都教我們一句他們母語的話。

all.en: We started a shared photo album online to document our growing collection of memorable recipes.
all.zh: 我們在網上建立了共享相簿，記錄日漸豐富的難忘食譜收藏。

all.en: Sarah suggested we publish a small cookbook to celebrate one full year of monthly potlucks.
all.zh: 莎拉提議我們出版一本小食譜，慶祝百樂餐聚會滿一週年。

all.en: That cookbook became a treasured gift for everyone who had ever joined our cozy table.
all.zh: 那本食譜成為每位曾加入我們溫馨餐桌的人珍藏的禮物。

all.en: For our cookbook launch party, we invited every friend who had ever joined our potluck gatherings.
all.zh: 為了食譜的發行派對，我們邀請了曾參加過百樂餐聚會的每一位朋友。

all.en: Each contributor signed copies of their own recipe pages with personal handwritten notes.
all.zh: 每位貢獻者都在自己食譜頁上簽名，並附上親筆手寫的留言。

all.en: Sarah wore a chef's apron she had embroidered with all fifteen members' first names.
all.zh: 莎拉穿著一條由她親手繡上全部十五位成員名字的廚師圍裙。

all.en: Tom prepared a special tasting menu featuring one signature dish from every represented country.
all.zh: 湯姆準備了一份特別的品嚐菜單，囊括每個成員國家的招牌料理。

all.en: My neighbor brought a homemade banner that read One Year of Open Doors and Full Plates.
all.zh: 我的鄰居帶來一條自製布條，上面寫著「敞開家門、滿盤美食的一年」。

all.en: A local food magazine covered the event and wrote about our diverse community of home cooks.
all.zh: 一家當地美食雜誌報導了這場活動，並撰文介紹我們多元的家庭料理社群。

all.en: Two readers contacted us afterward, asking how to start similar potluck clubs in their own cities.
all.zh: 事後有兩位讀者聯絡我們，詢問如何在自己的城市開創類似的百樂餐社團。

all.en: Inspired by their messages, we wrote a simple guide for hosting friendly multicultural dinners anywhere.
all.zh: 受到他們訊息的啟發，我們撰寫了一份簡易指南，介紹如何在任何地方舉辦友善的多元文化晚餐。

all.en: By our second anniversary, three new potluck groups had formed in nearby neighborhoods through our guide.
all.zh: 到我們週年慶第二年時，已有三個新的百樂餐社團透過我們的指南在鄰近社區成立。

all.en: Our small dinner tradition had quietly become a movement built on kindness, curiosity, and good food.
all.zh: 我們小小的晚餐傳統悄悄成為一場以善意、好奇心與美食為核心的運動。

all.en: By our third anniversary, our potluck movement had inspired similar groups in over twenty different cities.
all.zh: 到了我們三週年時，百樂餐運動已激勵超過二十個不同城市成立類似的社團。

all.en: A national magazine featured our community in a heartwarming twelve-page cover story that summer.
all.zh: 那年夏天，一家全國性雜誌以溫馨的十二頁封面故事介紹我們的社群。

all.en: Sarah was invited to speak at an international community-building conference held in beautiful Singapore.
all.zh: 莎拉受邀在美麗的新加坡舉行的國際社群營造大會上發表演說。

all.en: She brought home recipes from twelve countries that we incorporated into our growing potluck tradition.
all.zh: 她帶回了來自十二個國家的食譜，融入我們不斷成長的百樂餐傳統。

all.en: Tom officially became the head chef of a new community kitchen funded by our magazine partnership.
all.zh: 湯姆正式成為一個由我們的雜誌合作資助的新社區廚房的主廚。

all.en: That community kitchen offered free cooking classes to neighborhood families struggling with limited grocery budgets.
all.zh: 那間社區廚房為雜貨預算有限的社區家庭提供免費烹飪課程。

all.en: My neighbor began teaching elderly residents simple recipes through a friendly weekly afternoon gathering.
all.zh: 我的鄰居開始透過每週親切的下午聚會，教年長居民簡單的食譜。

all.en: We published a second cookbook in three languages to reach our increasingly diverse global audience.
all.zh: 我們用三種語言出版了第二本食譜，以觸及日益多元的全球讀者。

all.en: Several universities now use our cookbook in their hospitality and cultural studies programs as required reading.
all.zh: 目前已有數所大學將我們的食譜列為其餐旅與文化研究課程的指定讀物。

all.en: What began as a casual dinner had truly grown into a global celebration of food and friendship.
all.zh: 原本只是一場隨興的晚餐，如今已真正成長為一場全球性的美食與友誼盛會。

all.en: Universities invited me and my co-author to give joint lectures about food, culture, and friendship.
all.zh: 大學邀請我和共同作者一同演講，主題涵蓋飲食、文化與友誼。

all.en: Students from many countries asked thoughtful questions about preserving family recipes across long distances.
all.zh: 來自許多國家的學生提出深思熟慮的問題，探討如何在遙遠距離中保存家族食譜。

all.en: We listened carefully and gathered their suggestions for a third cookbook focused on diaspora kitchens.
all.zh: 我們仔細聆聽，並收集他們的建議，準備出版第三本以離散族群廚房為主題的食譜。

all.en: The new book included stories from immigrant families across twenty different gentle countries.
all.zh: 新書收錄了來自二十個溫柔國家的移民家庭故事。

all.en: Each recipe came with a short essay about how the dish helped one family stay connected to home.
all.zh: 每道食譜都附有一篇短文，講述這道菜如何讓一個家庭與家鄉保持連結。

all.en: A famous food magazine named our cookbook the most heartwarming culinary publication of the year.
all.zh: 一家著名美食雜誌將我們的食譜評為年度最溫暖的烹飪出版品。

all.en: We hosted a worldwide virtual potluck where readers cooked one recipe and shared photos online.
all.zh: 我們舉辦了一場全球線上百味餐會，讀者各自烹煮一道食譜並在線上分享照片。

all.en: Thousands of families participated, posting warm dishes from kitchens in every imaginable time zone.
all.zh: 數千個家庭參與，從可想到的每個時區的廚房上傳溫暖的菜餚。

all.en: Inspired neighbors organized smaller in-person potlucks across cities, restaurants, and community centers.
all.zh: 受啟發的鄰里在各城市、餐廳與社區中心舉辦較小型的實體百味餐會。

all.en: One casual dinner party had truly grown into the largest gentle culinary celebration our world had ever known.
all.zh: 一場隨興的晚餐派對，真正成長為我們世界所知最大的溫柔烹飪盛會。
